role: ArchSpine is a mirror system that provides AI-augmented architectural governance, automated validation, and intelligent documentation for software projects.
responsibility: The system integrates multiple modules orchestrated through a pipeline: configuration and scanning policies (.spine, rules) drive file discovery; AST extraction engines parse source code to detect dependencies and exports; architectural rules enforce layering and naming conventions; LLM infrastructure generates semantic summaries and structured outputs; CLI commands and MCP server expose operations for initialization, synchronization, fixing, scanning, publishing, and view generation; services manage session lifecycle with checkpoint/resume; infrastructure layers handle database persistence, credentials, prompt assembly, and manifest tracking; templates define contracts for atlas, prompts, rules, and risk views; tests ensure reliability across unit, integration, and end-to-end scenarios.

modules.role: Defines contribution guidelines and automated workflows for the ArchSpine project.
Directory containing GitHub issue templates for bug reports, feature requests, and documentation improvements.
Defines CI/CD workflows for the ArchSpine project.
Root directory of the ArchSpine project mirror system, containing core configuration and architectural rules.
Defines architectural constraints and naming conventions for the ArchSpine codebase.

Demonstration project directory for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Central configuration and state directory for the ArchSpine system within a demo project.
Directory containing the ArchSpine architecture rule definition file.
Checkpoint records directory for the ArchSpine sync pipeline execution.
Contains execution checkpoint records for the ArchSpine sync pipeline.
A sample project that demonstrates the ArchSpine architecture with API, domain, and infrastructure layers.
HTTP entry point handling user creation requests and delegating to the UserService domain service.
Domain service layer for managing User entities in the ArchSpine system.
Provides the database infrastructure layer for ArchSpine, including a placeholder connection class.
Defines the architectural and naming conventions that enforce codebase consistency and layering rules.
Defines the core schemas for metadata indexing, configuration, and governance of the ArchSpine mirror system.
This directory contains the core metadata, indexing configuration, and architectural governance rules for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Root directory of the ArchSpine project, containing build automation scripts, demonstration workflows, verification tools, and release management utilities.

Defines the architectural constraints and naming conventions for the ArchSpine codebase.

Entry point for all CLI subcommands, routing each command to its dedicated handler.
